intro: Quality day #1, Base (§4.C W6 Tue). Formal T-pace re-test under restored standard ordering — run AM, lift PM ≥6h gap (Adj #16). W5 Tue was lift-first back-to-back with no WU, which junked the RPE/HR signal; today is the clean read.
Hold 7:55–8:10/mi and gate on RPE: 8:00/mi should feel RPE 7 (could do 2 more reps). If it's harder than that with a proper warmup, drop to 8:05–8:10 (Adj #9/#16).
Incline BB steps 135 → 140 (clean W5 entry RIR 3/2/2, +5 per §5). Run-MHR retest still owed (Adj #9) — capture peak HR today.

Optional; holding clean since W4 Tue

lift.warmup: Incline BB: bar×8, 95×5, 115×3, 130×2, then working. General: 1–2 min band pull-aparts + scap push-ups. Pre-lift wrist-extensor isometric 3×30s/arm (§10.A).
lift.cooldown: SI prehab — Tyler twists 3×15, reverse Tyler 3×15, McGill Big 3 5-3-1

flags: Standard ordering restored: run AM, lift PM ≥6h gap (Adj #16) — this is the re-test, don't compress it
Off-191 HR zones skew low for running (Adj #9) — anchor to RPE + pace, not the ≤155 cap; peak will likely run 178–188 (prior T-runs), don't chase a number
Run-MHR retest still priority (Adj #9) — log peak HR; formal max test (treadmill 1% or 1500m all-out) can slot W6–W8
cardio.workout: 5×5 min @ T, 1 min jog rec, treadmill 1% incline (or flat outdoor)

targets.hr: Don't anchor to off-191 zones (Adj #9); expect ~178–188 peak, trust RPE/pace

cardio.warmup: 1.0–1.5 mi easy build to T pace (formal WU — W5 Tue entered cold)
cues: RPE gate is the whole point: 8:00/mi at RPE 7 = pace confirmed; >RPE 7 with proper WU → slow to 8:05–8:10 (Adj #9/#16)
Zoom Fly 6 first wear (threshold shoe, 0 mi) — carbon plate needs break-in, 6mm drop vs Vaporfly/Invincible; watch calves/Achilles, note hot spots
Even pacing across reps (±5s); rec jog, don't walk
